ValidationRule.description: Prevent lead status from going back to open, this validation is added as a workaround for Eloqua bug
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordTypeId <> '01230000001ZzA6', PRIORVALUE(Status) = 'Working', PRIORVALUE(Status) = 'Future-Nurturing', PRIORVALUE(Status) = 'Distributor', PRIORVALUE(Status) = 'Abandoned', PRIORVALUE(Status) = 'Qualified', LastModifiedById = '0053A00000DPNX3', ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Open') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_LEAD_005: Status cannot go back to Open again
